name: Halo Pear Laboratory-Grown Diamond Pendant
description: Pear-shaped laboratory-grown diamond pendant with halo detail and consultation-led customization. Dazzle confirms laboratory-grown diamond origin, certificate path, metal purity, and lead time before advance payment.

dimensions: Final measurements, ring size, chain length, or bracelet length confirmed during consultation.

uniqueFeatures: Consultation-first design with explicit origin disclosure and verification before order confirmation.
